debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E
Ω : Opens E
n : ℕ∞
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝² : OpensMeasurableSpace E
F : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup F
inst✝ : NormedSpace ℝ F
f f' : E → F
μ : Measure E
h : f =ᶠ[ae (μ.restrict ↑Ω)] f'
⊢ @Distribution.ofFunWithOrder E inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ Ω n inst✝³ inst✝² F inst✝¹ inst✝ f μ =
    @Distribution.ofFunWithOrder E inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ Ω n inst✝³ inst✝² F inst✝¹ inst✝ f' μ

      ofFunWithOrder_of_not_locallyIntegrable (Ω := Ω) (n := n) (f := f') (μ := μ) hf']

  by_cases hf : LocallyIntegrableOn f Ω μ
  · have hf' : LocallyIntegrableOn f' Ω μ := hf.congr h
    ext φ
    simp [ofFunWithOrder_apply (Ω := Ω) (n := n) (μ := μ) hf,
      ofFunWithOrder_apply (Ω := Ω) (n := n) (μ := μ) hf', integral_congr_ae, h]
  · have hf' : ¬ LocallyIntegrableOn f' Ω μ := by
      intro hf'
      exact hf (hf'.congr h.symm)
    simp [ofFunWithOrder_of_not_locallyIntegrable (Ω := Ω) (n := n) (μ := μ) hf,
      ofFunWithOrder_of_not_locallyIntegrable (Ω := Ω) (n := n) (μ := μ) hf']
